title: Sweet and Sour Pork Tacos
description: A unique fusion of Chinese and Mexican flavors, this sweet and sour pork taco recipe is a game-changer.
instructions: 1. Marinate the pork shoulder in a mixture of soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and brown sugar for at least 30 minutes.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the marinated pork and cook until browned and cooked through.
4. Remove the pork from the wok and set aside.
5. In the same wok, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and cook the streaky bacon until crispy.
6. Add the azucarado and cook for 1-2 minutes.
7. Add the cooked pork back into the wok and stir to combine with the bacon and azucarado.
8. Warm the tacos according to package instructions.
9. Assemble the tacos by placing the pork mixture onto a taco and serving immediately.
